title: Automatice Ore No More: Create
description: Disable Create's ore farm. Ore Farming will no longer work due to changed recipes. No more Nuggets. Back to the grind!
body:
Disable all automatic ore generators with a simple data pack! The goal of this little data pack is to remove Create's ore drop chance for all nuggets or to disrupt the process needed.

This Data Pack simply modifies all relevant recipes of Create to not drop ore nuggets anymore.
Tuff and gravel will not drop any ore nuggets. Sand can not be transformed to soul sand.

No more magic. Back to the grind!
